Preferred Vendors & Partners

People we trust, vetted by us.

Buying or selling a home takes a whole team. These are the lenders, closers, insurers, contractors, and local businesses we work with across the Twin Cities and western Wisconsin — and would send our own families to.

Every name here is someone our team has worked with directly. We share them as a starting point, not a requirement — you're always free to choose any provider you like. Tell us what you need and we'll point you to the right person.

Need someone we don't list here?

Inspectors, movers, stagers, attorneys — chances are we know a good one. Ask us and we'll make an introduction.

Talk to our team

Progressive Real Estate Group lists these partners as a convenience to our clients. They are independent businesses and are not affiliates of Progressive Real Estate Group or RE/MAX Results. A listing here is not an endorsement or guarantee of any service, and you are free to choose any provider you prefer.
